entities.name: FOOD-SYSTEM DIVIDE
entities.description: A hindrance to achieving a healthy population and sustainable agricultural systems in developing countries

entities.description: The goal of achieving a population with good health through nutrition

entities.description: Agricultural systems that are environmentally sustainable and economically viable

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where the food-system divide is a major hindrance

entities.description: The group of three major crops (rice, wheat, and maize) providing 50% of global calories and protein

entities.description: The requirement for a wider variety of foods in human consumption

entities.name: ON-FARM DIVERSITY
entities.description: The requirement for a wider variety of crops grown on farms

entities.name: NUTRITIOUS AND HEALTHY
entities.description: The quality of being good for human health

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTALLY SUSTAINABLE
entities.description: The quality of being good for the planet

entities.name: VIABLE AND CLIMATE SMART

entities.description: Foods that can be eaten as primary sources of nutrition
